Id1.text: The School of Business and Social Sciences at the Aarhus University was established in 1928. It has 737 academic staff and 16,000 students.

Id2.text: The School of Business and Social Sciences at Aarhus University was established in 1928. It has 16000 students and an academic staff of 737.

Id3.text: The School of Business and Social Sciences at the Aarhus University was established in 1928 and currently has a staff of 737 and a student population of 16000.
